specification:
Type: Diagram **sim-id:** green-roof-layers
**Library:** diagram.js (shared-libs)
**Layout:** dual-panel
**Status:** Specified A cross-section diagram of an extensive moss green roof showing all layers: **Image description for generation:** A detailed cross-section illustration of a building roof structure showing the complete green roof assembly from bottom to top. The view is from the side, showing a 45-degree-angle cutaway of a flat commercial building roof. Layers from bottom to top: - Structural roof deck: gray concrete slab (color: #808080), 15 cm thick, with visible rebar pattern - Waterproof membrane: black sheet (color: #1A1A1A), 3-5 mm thick, continuous across the entire surface - Root barrier: dark brown sheet (color: #4A3728), thin layer directly above membrane - Drainage mat: blue-gray dimpled plastic sheet (color: #5B7B8A), showing the dimpled profile that creates channels for water flow. Small blue water droplets visible between dimples. - Filter fabric: white/light gray felt layer (color: #E0E0E0), thin - Substrate layer: brown soil/growing medium (color: #6B4226), 5-8 cm deep, with visible perlite specks (#F0F0F0) - Vegetation layer: bright green moss carpet on top (colors: #4CAF50, #2E7D32), showing varied textures of different moss species. Some areas show moss cushions (acrocarpous), others show flat spreading mats (pleurocarpous). Blue arrows show water path: rain falling from above, absorbed by moss, filtering through substrate, flowing along drainage mat to a gutter at the edge. Red arrows show heat being reflected/blocked by the green roof. Background: light sky blue (#87CEEB) above, building interior (#F5F0E6) below. **Overlay regions:** - Structural Deck region — bottom layer, tooltip: "Reinforced concrete or steel deck. Must support 40-80 kg/m² saturated load for moss extensive roof." - Waterproof Membrane region — tooltip: "EPDM rubber or TPO membrane. Critical barrier protecting building from moisture. Lasts 40-60 years under a green roof." - Root Barrier region — tooltip: "Prevents root/rhizoid penetration. Often integrated into the waterproof membrane." - Drainage Mat region — tooltip: "Dimpled mat creates channels for lateral water flow to roof drains. Prevents waterlogging." - Filter Fabric region — tooltip: "Geotextile that prevents fine substrate particles from clogging the drainage layer." - Substrate region — tooltip: "Lightweight growing medium: 60-80% mineral (expanded clay, pumice), 20-40% organic (compost). pH 5.5-7.0." - Moss Layer region — tooltip: "Living moss carpet. Absorbs rainfall, provides evaporative cooling, insulates, and sequesters carbon." **Learning objective:** (L2 — Understand) Students can identify each layer of a green roof system and explain its function in protecting the building and supporting vegetation. Implementation: diagram.js with dual-panel layout and hover tooltips
